title: オークスの後に・冠はなくとも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Air Groove is unable to take first
place. All the same, her satisfied fans cheer her
performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober, who had been struggling with her
self-esteem, watches Air Groove run and realizes
she wants to be just like her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling the gaze of the world upon her, Air
Groove states clearly her intention to give a
better performance at the Shuka Sho.
